headline: סימון כבישים וחניונים עם סימונים - הבטיחו את הבטיחות על הכביש
subhead: פתרונות סימון מקצועיים למניעת תאונות והכוונת הנהגים
bullet_points: צבעים תקניים ועמידים לשימוש ארוך טווח
image_prompt: A dramatic and professional editorial photograph of a freshly painted road with crisp, high-contrast lane markings and arrows at dusk. The scene should include lush green trees on the side of the road and a warm, glowing sunset in the background, creating cinematic lighting. The photograph must be devoid of any people, vehicles, or text, only showing the road and its markings with rich textures and bold composition to suggest safety and direction. Ensure the details are rich and studio-quality realism is achieved with a strong depth of field.
